title: salix × rubra subsp. forbyana
intro: Salix × rubra subsp. forbyana, also known as Forby's willow, is a hybrid willow species that belongs to the Salicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to reduce inflammation, fever, and pain due to its salicylic acid content. The health benefits of Forby's willow include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve arthritis symptoms, and act as an antiseptic. Forby's willow can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
